role: Defines the core schemas for metadata indexing, configuration, and governance of the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibility: Provide a unified schema framework for defining folder units, manifests, project units, rules, and spine units, ensuring consistent validation, provenance tracking, and policy enforcement across the system.

children.role: This directory contains the core metadata, indexing configuration, and architectural governance rules for the ArchSpine mirror system.
Defines shared data type definitions used across all ArchSpine schemas to ensure type consistency and validation.
Defines the schema for a folder unit within the ArchSpine documentation index, used to record the role, responsibility, and children file entries of a directory in the project.
Manifest schema for ArchSpine sync index, recording the state of indexed source files, their documentation mappings across locales, and synchronization metadata.

Defines the structure and required fields for documenting a project unit within the ArchSpine mirror system, ensuring consistent representation of project metadata, module decomposition, and generation provenance.
Defines the schema for ArchSpine rule documents, ensuring consistency and enforceability of architectural and coding rules.
Defines the structural schema for ArchSpine SpineUnit documents, ensuring consistency and validity of unit metadata across the system.
